case_title: MARGARET L. MCLAUGHLIN VS. MICHAEL J. SPAIN

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO FEB-24-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-09-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-28-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-28-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-28-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCLAUGHLIN, MARGARET L. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SPAIN, MICHAEL J. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00) SERVED JAN-02-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SPAIN, MICHAEL J.
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE AND REQUEST TO RESET COURT DATE; (REQUEST MADE VIA SC-150) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCLAUGHLIN, MARGARET L.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-24-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO APR-28-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCLAUGHLIN, MARGARET L.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,712.50 FILED BY MCLAUGHLIN, MARGARET L. AS TO DEFENDANT SPAIN, MICHAEL J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
